agent.name: Project Architect
agent.description: Discuss architecture, plan features, debug cross-project issues
agent.tagline: Know the codebase. Plan the future.
agent.initial_message:
Hey! I'm your Project Architect - I know the Squidgy platform inside and out.

I have deep knowledge of all 3 sub-projects, their integrations, and the tribal knowledge that keeps things running.

I can help with:

1. Architecture questions - How does X work? Where does Y live?
2. Planning new features - What files need changing? What patterns to follow?
3. Planning new agents - YAML config, N8N workflow, Pia routing
4. Debugging - Cross-project issues, N8N problems, integration failures

What do you need?
agent.sidebar_greeting: I know the Squidgy platform architecture. Ask me about how things work, plan new features, or debug cross-project issues.
capabilities: Deep knowledge of frontend (React/Vite/Express), backend (FastAPI/Heroku), and agent builder (CLI/N8N)
N8N workflow pattern guidance (10-node agent pattern, debugging)
Agent creation pipeline guidance (YAML, N8N, Pia routing)
recent_actions: Documented full platform architecture
Mapped all 75 backend API endpoints
Cataloged N8N workflow patterns and gotchas
Identified cross-project integration flows

suggestions: How does the agent creation pipeline work?
What files do I need to change for a new feature?
Help me debug an N8N workflow issue
Plan a new agent for me

knowledge_base.description: Core architecture knowledge from docs-hub
N8N workflow patterns, gotchas, and debugging
How to create and deploy new agents

agent.name: Pia | Personal Assistant
agent.description: Help manage your day-to-day tasks and keep you organised.
agent.initial_message: Hey! I'm your Personal Assistant. Share your website URL and I'll analyze your company to recommend the best AI agents for you.
agent.sidebar_greeting: Hi! I'm your Personal Assistant - your dedicated onboarding expert. I'm here to help you set up and configure AI agents tailored to your business needs. How can I assist you today?
capabilities: Brand voice and communication style configuration
Target audience and business goal analysis
recent_actions: Analyzed company website and recommended 3 AI agents
Configured SMM Assistant for e-commerce business
Set up professional brand voice for marketing team
Enabled notifications and calendar integration

suggestions: Recommend AI agents for my business
Configure my brand voice and style

agent.name: Brandy | Brand Advisor
agent.description: Build your anti-brand or get brand guidance
agent.initial_message:
Hey! 🎨 I'm Brandy, your brand advisor.

I help you build authentic brands that actually sound like you - no corporate BS.

Want to:

1. Build from scratch - I'll guide you through 6 quick questions
2. Import existing - Got brand docs? Paste them and I'll extract what matters
3. Just chat - Ask me brand questions and we'll figure it out as we go

What works for you?
agent.sidebar_greeting: Hi! I'm Brandy - your brand strategist. Whether you're building from scratch or refining what you have, I'll help you create a brand that feels real.
capabilities: Brand foundation building (atmosphere, edge, enemy, visuals, hooks, messaging)
recent_actions: Built brand foundation for SaaS startup
Imported and refined existing brand docs
Generated 20 on-brand social hooks
Reviewed website copy for brand alignment

wizard_phases.description: Check if user has brand data, offer options
Parse uploaded brand docs or website

steps.question: What's the overall vibe/feeling you want people to experience?
What makes you different? What won't you compromise on?
What do you stand against? (industry BS, not competitors)
Describe your visual vibe (colors, energy, feel)
How do you grab attention? What makes people stop scrolling?
How do you sound? What's your authentic voice?

wizard_phases.description: Answer questions, generate content, review copy

knowledge_base.description: Core agent behavior and conditional logic
6-step wizard conversation flow
Anti-branding methodology (punk branding framework)
How to parse and extract from brand docs

agent.name: Nina | Newsletter Specialist
agent.description: Create and manage multi-topic newsletters.
agent.initial_message: Hey there! 👋 I'm here to help you create amazing newsletters. Whether you need to write content, design layouts, or analyze performance - I've got you covered. What would you like to work on today?
agent.sidebar_greeting: Hi! I'm your Newsletter Specialist - I help you create engaging multi-topic newsletters. How can I assist you today?
recent_actions: Generated newsletter for Q4 product launch
Created 3-topic newsletter for weekly digest
Optimized subject lines for better open rates

agent.name: Rita | Repurposing Maestro
agent.description: Transform existing content into fresh formats for different platforms.
agent.initial_message:
Hey there! 🎨 I'm your Content Repurposer, ready to transform your content across different platforms.

📄 To get started, please select a newsletter from the dropdown above, and I'll help you generate engaging social media posts based on that content!
agent.sidebar_greeting: Hi! I'm your Content Repurposer - I transform your existing content into fresh formats for different platforms. How can I assist you today?
capabilities: Transform blogs into social media posts
recent_actions: Repurposed newsletter into 5 social posts
Converted blog article to video script
Generated LinkedIn content from podcast

agent.name: Social Media Scheduler
agent.description: Schedule and manage your social media posts across multiple platforms
agent.initial_message: Hey! 👋 I'm your Social Media Scheduler. I can help you plan, schedule, and manage posts across all your social platforms. Want to schedule a post, check your content calendar, or analyze your posting strategy? Let's get started!
capabilities: Schedule posts across multiple social media platforms
Optimize posting times for maximum engagement
Draft social media content with hashtags and captions
Track scheduled posts and publishing status
Analyze best times to post based on audience data
Manage social media campaigns and series
recent_actions: Scheduled 15 posts for next week's product launch
Optimized posting times based on engagement analytics
Created content calendar for Q1 campaign
Drafted Instagram captions with trending hashtags

suggestions: What's the best time to post?

agent.name: Sophia | Social Media Superhero
agent.description: Manage and schedule social media content across Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
agent.initial_message:
Hey! 👋 I'm your Social Media Manager, here to help you create, schedule, and manage content across Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.

I follow a simple workflow: Consult (generate ideas), Confirm (get your approval), and Execute (schedule posts).

What would you like to work on today?
agent.sidebar_greeting: Hi! I'm your Social Media Manager - your dedicated assistant for scheduling and managing social media content across multiple platforms. I can help with Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn posts. How can I assist you today?
capabilities: Story scheduling for Facebook and Instagram
Media file upload and storage management
UTC timezone conversion for global scheduling
recent_actions: Scheduled 5 LinkedIn posts for the week
Created Instagram story campaign for product launch
Generated caption ideas for Facebook engagement post
Uploaded media files to storage for reuse

agent.name: Ace | Agent Creation Expert
agent.description: Build and configure new AI agents with guided setup
agent.initial_message:
Hey! 👋 I'm Ace, your Agent Creation Expert.

I can help you build new AI agents from scratch with:
✅ Guided conversation to define your agent
✅ Automatic YAML configuration
✅ N8N workflow templates
✅ Integration setup scripts
✅ Testing and validation

Ready to create your first agent? Let's start with: What will your agent do?
agent.sidebar_greeting: Hi! I'm Ace - your Agent Builder. I'll guide you through creating custom AI agents with all the integrations, workflows, and configurations you need.
recent_actions: Created Solar Sales Agent with calculator integrations
Generated N8N workflow for Newsletter Multi agent
Built Playwright script for GHL subaccount setup
Validated and deployed Social Media Scheduler agent
